summary: Iteration 32 testing complete. All requested features tested and working: Landing page, Login with admin credentials, Dashboard access, AI Chat widget, API health endpoint, Enterprise dashboard, and Employee portal.

issues: Cookie consent banner has high z-index (9999) which can block interactions with AI Chat widget until dismissed

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are working correctly
Login flow with admin credentials (info@manoprotect.com / 19862210Des) works and redirects to dashboard
AI Chat widget responds with relevant information about ManoProtect features
Enterprise dashboard returns proper metrics and threat analysis data
Employee portal shows connected employees, messaging, and download options
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing admin account
